full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Structuring the step-by-step breakdown of the poisoning attack Algorithm 1
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Explain the step-by-step process of the poisoning attack in Algorithm 1 of Biggio et al. 2012, breaking it into input/what happens/purpose format.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Rewrote the summary to focus on the kernelisation novelty. Added specific paper references and section numbers. Verified all LaTeX equations against the paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided a clear pedagogical structure for breaking down the 7 steps of the attack algorithm.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Cross-checked every equation reference against the paper (Eqs. 4-10, Algorithm 1). Verified step descriptions match the code in task_2_2.ipynb.

full_llm_interaction_log.model: Gemini 3 Deep Think with Deep Research
full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Deep research on the implicit function theorem connection to KKT conditions
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How does the implicit function theorem connect to the KKT conditions in deriving Equation 10 of the SVM poisoning paper?
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Verified the derivation pathway and confirmed the Sherman-Morrison-Woodbury formula usage in Eq. 8.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Used Deep Research to trace the mathematical lineage from KKT stationarity through implicit differentiation to the closed-form gradient.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked Section 2.1 derivation and confirmed the matrix inversion formula against the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided concise phrasing for the novelty statement.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Confirmed against Section 1 introduction and Section 4 conclusions.
